replies.msg:
最近想搵下啲Haskell data structures and algorithms嘅書嚟睇下, 點知google極都唔覺有! 比較接近嘅得一本叫"Learning Functional Data Structures and Algorithms (Feb 2017)", 但都好似唔係講Haskell嘅, 個book description只提及Scala, Clojure and Elixir!

係差不多放棄之際, 就見到呢篇文, Functional programming with graphs (https://futtetennismo.me/posts/algorithms-and-data-structures/2017-12-08-functional-graphs.html), 文中就提到:

... basically the only book on the subject of functional data structures out there is Purely Functional Data Structures by Chris Okasaki, released in 2008 (and it’s pretty advanced material) and the only book I am aware of that focused on functional algorithms is Pearls of Functional Algorithm Design by Richard Bird.

屌, 全宇宙就係得呢兩本有用Haskell做illustration, 一本講data structures, 另一本講就講algorithms! 呢兩本嘢仲要好advanced, 似係scientists/mathematicians先睇得掂!

點解得咁少書講functional data structures and algorithms架?!!! 但講imperative或者OO嘅就多到喊, 公平咩?!

想搵本入門書睇下都唔得, 唉!
搵唔到錢
巴打大學讀咩

巴打大學讀咩

唔係讀CS! 雖然當年Year 1有修過一科Introduction to Computer Science (i.e. Pascal Programming! ), that's all!

搵唔到錢


其實Haskell係IT業界幾出名下, 好多跨國大公司有用佢做development, 最近先見到Standard Chartered Bank出Ads請多名Haskell developers!

Haskell in Industry:
https://wiki.haskell.org/Haskell_in_industry
modern dev 都係imperative mix functional 架啦 做乜係都要考古

modern dev 都係imperative mix functional 架啦 做乜係都要考古

最近想搵下啲Haskell data structures and algorithms嘅書嚟睇下, 點知google極都唔覺有! 比較接近嘅得一本叫"Learning Functional Data Structures and Algorithms (Feb 2017)", 但都好似唔係講Haskell嘅, 個book description只提及Scala, Clojure and Elixir!

係差不多放棄之際, 就見到呢篇文, Functional programming with graphs (https://futtetennismo.me/posts/algorithms-and-data-structures/2017-12-08-functional-graphs.html), 文中就提到:

... basically the only book on the subject of functional data structures out there is Purely Functional Data Structures by Chris Okasaki, released in 2008 (and it’s pretty advanced material) and the only book I am aware of that focused on functional algorithms is Pearls of Functional Algorithm Design by Richard Bird.

屌, 全宇宙就係得呢兩本有用Haskell做illustration, 一本講data structures, 另一本講就講algorithms! 呢兩本嘢仲要好advanced, 似係scientists/mathematicians先睇得掂!

點解得咁少書講functional data structures and algorithms架?!!! 但講imperative或者OO嘅就多到喊, 公平咩?!

想搵本入門書睇下都唔得, 唉!


Okasaki可以搵PhD thesis嚟睇。Bird個本就上Amazon啦。

利申：兩本都未睇過。

搵唔到錢


其實Haskell係IT業界幾出名下, 好多跨國大公司有用佢做development, 最近先見到Standard Chartered Bank出Ads請多名Haskell developers!

Haskell in Industry:
https://wiki.haskell.org/Haskell_in_industry


金融業有人鐘意用Functional Programming。香港可以睇下Jane Street。

Okasaki可以搵PhD thesis嚟睇。Bird個本就上Amazon啦。

利申：兩本都未睇過。


呢兩本嘢斷估都係用mathematicians個mindset嚟寫, theory+proof 99%, (practical?)examples 1%左右(情況如同Haskell's Official Documentation咁糟糕!), 唔太啱我呢D唔係CS/Maths background嘅rookie睇!
請問C4F兄, 有冇啲少講theory但有極多examples嘅專講Haskell data structures/algorithms嘅blogs/websites介紹下嚟睇?

做it先驚中年失業 你仲要玩blockchain
睇嚟都係繼續研究下Haskell啲ADT同Generics先, 遲啲先學DSA!

本大笨象睇過未？Humble做特價：

https://www.humblebundle.com/books/be-a-coder-books

本大笨象睇過未？Humble做特價：

https://www.humblebundle.com/books/be-a-coder-books



BTW，大笨象online版係免費：
http://learnyouahaskell.com/

Real World Haskell都係：
http://book.realworldhaskell.org/

Parallel and Concurrent Programming in Haskell：
http://chimera.labs.oreilly.com/books/1230000000929/index.html

purely functional data structures其實都幾academic或者數底

看官數底唔強就用Elm學下
https://www.classes.cs.uchicago.edu/archive/2016/winter/22300-1/

做it先驚中年失業 你仲要玩blockchain

一隻打倒曲又講得幾嘴既IT狗一定唔會差
你做startup間嘢紅咗，其實好過中六合彩添

purely functional data structures其實都幾academic或者數底

看官數底唔強就用Elm學下
https://www.classes.cs.uchicago.edu/archive/2016/winter/22300-1/


我要求唔高, 只要講少啲理論, 講多啲illustrated examples就好滿足了, 奈何寫書/寫documentation班教授大多鍾意做相反嘅嘢, academic都PK, 似乎唔想多啲人識噉!

Elm太後生, 又無Haskell咁全面, 唔會學住囉!

本大笨象睇過未？Humble做特價：

https://www.humblebundle.com/books/be-a-coder-books



BTW，大笨象online版係免費：
http://learnyouahaskell.com/

Real World Haskell都係：
http://book.realworldhaskell.org/

Parallel and Concurrent Programming in Haskell：
http://chimera.labs.oreilly.com/books/1230000000929/index.html


Thanks!
我諗學過Haskell嘅人, 幾乎全部都會睇過大笨象, 因為本書實在太出名了!
BTW, 而家係睇緊Haskell Programming from First Principles, 過千頁, 有排睇!
